assertions.assertion: A ScopeRequirement class is created implementing IAuthorizationRequirement with a Scope property
assertions.rationale: The code defines 'public class ScopeRequirement : IAuthorizationRequirement' with a 'public string Scope { get; }' property.

assertions.assertion: A ScopeHandler class is created extending AuthorizationHandler<ScopeRequirement>
assertions.rationale: The code defines 'public class ScopeHandler : AuthorizationHandler<ScopeRequirement>'.

assertions.assertion: The handler splits the scope claim value using Split(' ') or similar space-delimiter parsing
The handler calls context.Succeed(requirement) when the scope matches, and does NOT call context.Fail() on mismatch
assertions.rationale: The handler calls context.Succeed(requirement) when matching and simply returns Task.CompletedTask without calling Fail() on mismatch. Explicitly notes not to call Fail().

assertions.assertion: The ScopeHandler is registered in DI as IAuthorizationHandler
